The Best Spa Experience in Kumily

Relax, unwind, and enjoy a rejuvenating spa experience at Tapasya. Leave feeling lighter, refreshed, and at ease.

Learn More

A Spa Built
Around Your
Comfort

Explore your inner world and find true calm

Tapasya Ayurvedic Spa is a wellness destination in Kumily offering a blend of Western, Ayurvedic, and Asian massage therapies. Created with a focus on relaxation and care, Tapasya provides a space where travelers and guests can step away from stress and experience true comfort.

We welcome individuals, couples, and tourists looking for a reliable and professional spa experience during their stay in Thekkady.

Book Appointment
Our Signature Experiences

Step Into Serenity

Signature spa therapies designed to relax the body, restore balance, and elevate your spa journey in Kumily.

SignatureFull Body

Tapasya Signature Massage

A complete full-body therapy using aromatic oils and expert techniques to restore energy flow and improve circulation.

Read More
Deep TissueRecovery

Sports Massage / Deep Tissue

Designed for muscle recovery and tension relief, using deep pressure techniques to improve mobility and reduce stiffness.

Read More
BalineseOil + Dry

Tapasya Balinese Massage

A unique blend of oil and dry massage focusing on pressure points to balance energy and rejuvenate the body.

Read More
Skin CareRadiance

Facials

Rejuvenating skin treatments that cleanse, exfoliate, and hydrate — leaving your skin refreshed, glowing, and healthy.

Read More

Ensuite Shower

All Treatments

Every Body Deserves Care

Aroma oil full-body massage with foot reflexology, head, face & shoulder massage. Includes foot scrub, shower & detox tea.

60 min — ₹3,750

What Our Guests Say

Trusted by Travelers in Thekkady

Real words from real guests — sourced from our Google Reviews.

“

It was one of the best massages I have received — and I live in Indonesia, just for reference! It was great from beginning to end. Extra clean, the therapist was very very good. It's very rare that I leave a review but this one deserves it. I was even able to shower after, and the lemongrass oil used for the massage smelled amazing. Thanks a lot!

Louise Marie Letoublon
via Google Reviews
“

Best spa in Thekkady. Very clean and hygiene is maintained. Me and my girlfriends had a great time. We did facials and Swedish massage — very impressive. The staff are well trained and professional. Good hospitality.

Uimma Uima
via Google Reviews
“

You have the best sports therapist, honestly. The therapist was really good. I give 5/5 — the massage was really amazing and I could finally get a peaceful sleep!

Ezhil PS
via Google Reviews
“

This is the original location and the service is very professional. The owner Mr. Alex explained all types of services very humbly, listened to our requirements, and suggested the right treatment based on our needs.

SenthilKumar Thangaraj
via Google Reviews
